title: When I Feel Sad
subtitle: Tanuki sits with you when you feel blue.

steps.text: Put your hand on your heart. Notice how it feels.
Say quietly: “I feel sad right now.”
steps.hint: Naming feelings can help them feel smaller.

steps.text: Imagine Tanuki sitting next to you, holding your hand.
Take three slow breaths together with Tanuki.
steps.hint: In… and out… nice and slow.
